extension_name.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store

extension_description.message: Automatic detection of scam and phishing sites. Plain language, for everyone.
extension_description.description: Short description for Chrome Web Store

status_warning_subtitle.message: $N$ links on this page need a closer look

status_danger_subtitle.message: $DOMAIN$ is pretending to be someone else to steal your information

onboarding_tip.message: I'll check every link you see. Dangerous ones get a red mark. Try right-clicking a link → "Check with Cleanway".

aha_found_scams.message: I found $N$ scam links your browser missed

recent_empty.message: Nothing found yet — browse normally, I'm watching.

nudge_threshold_subtitle.message: Blocking stays free forever. Unlock the full "why dangerous" details on Personal.

device_override_subtitle.message: Apply skill level + accessibility to just this browser install. Other devices on this account stay on your default.

device_override_toggle_desc.message: When on, the controls below write only to this device — your account default is unchanged.

device_clear_overrides_desc.message: Reverts this device to your account default.

family_hub_subtitle.message: Get notified when scams are blocked on your loved ones' devices. End-to-end encrypted — even Cleanway can't read the alerts.

family_none_label.message: You're not in a family yet

family_none_desc.message: Create one and invite up to 5 others. Or join an existing family using a code.

family_invite_desc.message: Generates a one-time code + PIN. Send them by SMS or in person.

family_alerts_empty.message: No alerts yet — you'll see family blocks here as they happen.

family_invite_modal_title.message: Share this with your family member

family_invite_modal_desc.message: Both values appear once. After this dialog closes, you can't see them again — generate another invite if needed.

family_join_paste_hint.message: Tip: paste a Cleanway invite link in the first field — it'll fill in the PIN for you.

trust_footer.message: Your data never leaves this device

block_explanation.message: $DOMAIN$ is pretending to be someone else so it can steal your information.

block_scheme_heading.message: How scammers use sites like this:

block_scheme_step1.message: You will be asked for your password or bank details

block_scheme_step2.message: The scammer steals what you type

block_scheme_step3.message: They drain your account or steal your identity

block_proceed_button.message: I understand the risk — open anyway

block_trust_footer.message: Protected by Cleanway. Your data stays on your device.

welcome_hero_subtitle.message: Every link you see is being checked. Dangerous ones will be blocked automatically.

welcome_step1_desc.message: Every page, every link. Green badge means safe. Red means scam.

welcome_step2_desc.message: We only check domain names. Your browsing history never leaves this device.

welcome_step3_desc.message: Most checks happen on your device in under a second. Just browse normally.

welcome_step4_desc.message: Protect parents, kids, grandparents with one plan. Different modes for each.

welcome_cta_scan.message: Scan my inbox for hidden scams

welcome_trust_footer.message: Free forever for blocking. Your data never leaves this device.
